approximations: High-temperature (small-field) expansion of the one-loop finite-T effective potential
CW mechanism at one loop; higher-order corrections neglected
Renormalisation scale set to the VEV chi0

backend_choice.reason: Conformal scale-invariant single-field SU(2) model with CW mechanism, all masses proportional to chi0

beta_lambda.description: CW beta_lambda coefficient for the quartic coupling

m_chi2.description: Mass squared of the radial (pseudo-dilaton) mode

gb_scalar.description: Mass-over-vev ratio for the radial scalar (auto-computed by backend)

delta_V.description: Vacuum energy density difference at zero temperature
